{"time":"00:05","event":"available_commands_update","data":{"availableCommands":[{"description":"Add a directory to the allowed list for file access","input":{"hint":"directory"},"name":"add-dir"},{"description":"Enable all permissions","input":{"hint":"[on|off|show]"},"name":"allow-all"},{"description":"Toggle autopilot mode","input":{"hint":"[on|off]"},"name":"autopilot"},{"description":"Summarize conversation history to reduce context window usage. Optionally provide focus instructions.","input":{"hint":"focus instructions"},"name":"compact"},{"description":"Session history tools and insights","input":{"hint":"[standup|search|tips|cost-tips|improve|reindex]"},"name":"chronicle"},{"description":"Show context window token usage and visualization","name":"context"},{"description":"Change working directory or show current directory","input":{"hint":"directory"},"name":"cwd"},{"description":"Show loaded environment details (instructions, MCP servers, skills, agents, hooks, plugins, LSPs, extensions)","name":"env"},{"description":"Schedule a recurring prompt or skill for this session","input":{"hint":"<interval> <prompt>"},"name":"every"},{"description":"Schedule a one-shot prompt or skill for this session","input":{"hint":"<delay> <prompt>"},"name":"after"},{"description":"Enable fleet mode for parallel subagent execution","input":{"hint":"prompt"},"name":"fleet"},{"description":"Initialize Copilot instructions for this repository","input":{"hint":"[suppress]"},"name":"init"},{"description":"Display all allowed directories for file access","name":"list-dirs"},{"description":"Manage MCP server configuration","input":{"hint":"[list|show|enable|disable|reload]"},"name":"mcp"},{"description":"Show memory status, or enable/disable memory across sessions","input":{"hint":"[on|off|show]"},"name":"memory"},{"description":"Select AI model to use","input":{"hint":"model"},"name":"model"},{"description":"Create an implementation plan before coding","input":{"hint":"prompt"},"name":"plan"},{"description":"Manage plugins and plugin marketplaces","input":{"hint":"[list]"},"name":"plugin"},{"description":"Rename the current session","input":{"hint":"name"},"name":"rename"},{"description":"Run deep research investigation using GitHub search and web sources","input":{"hint":"topic"},"name":"research"},{"description":"Show remote status or toggle remote control from GitHub web and mobile","input":{"hint":"[on|off|show]"},"name":"remote"},{"description":"Reset the list of allowed tools","name":"reset-allowed-tools"},{"description":"Run code review agent to analyze changes","input":{"hint":"additional instructions"},"name":"review"},{"description":"Get an independent critique of your current work from the rubber duck agent","input":{"hint":"additional instructions"},"name":"rubber-duck"},{"description":"Configure sandbox modes","input":{"hint":"[enable|disable]"},"name":"sandbox"},{"description":"Analyze staged and unstaged changes for security vulnerabilities.","input":{"hint":"additional instructions"},"name":"security-review"},{"description":"View and manage sessions","input":{"hint":"[info|checkpoints|files|plan|rename]"},"name":"session"},{"description":"Share the session via GitHub and get a shareable link","input":{"hint":"[link|off]"},"name":"share"},{"description":"Manage skills for enhanced capabilities","input":{"hint":"[list|info|reload]"},"name":"skills"},{"description":"Manage Copilot Subconscious memory consolidation","input":{"hint":"[run]"},"name":"subconscious"},{"description":"Display session usage metrics and statistics","name":"usage"},{"description":"Guide for writing ast-grep rules to perform structural code search and analysis. Use when users need to search codebases using Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) patterns, find specific code structures, or perform complex code queries that go beyond simple text search. This skill should be used when users ask to search for code patterns, find specific language constructs, or locate code with particular structural characteristics.","input":{"hint":"instructions for the skill"},"name":"ast-grep"},{"description":"Orchestrate multiple worktree agents. Spawn, monitor, communicate, and merge.","input":{"hint":"instructions for the skill"},"name":"coordinator"},{"description":"Remove signs of AI-generated writing from text. Use when editing or reviewing
text to make it sound more natural and human-written. Based on Wikipedia's
comprehensive "Signs of AI writing" guide. Detects and fixes patterns including:
inflated symbolism, promotional language, superficial -ing analyses, vague
attributions, em dash overuse, rule of three, AI vocabulary words, passive
voice, negative parallelisms, and filler phrases.
","input":{"hint":"instructions for the skill"},"name":"humanizer"},{"description":"Commit, rebase, and merge the current branch.","input":{"hint":"instructions for the skill"},"name":"merge"},{"description":"Write a PR description using conversation context and open PR creation in browser.","input":{"hint":"instructions for the skill"},"name":"open-pr"},{"description":"Rebase the current branch with smart conflict resolution.","input":{"hint":"instructions for the skill"},"name":"rebase"},{"description":"Coordinate Workmux tmux agents reliably. Use when delegating tasks to parallel worktree agents, optionally running a separate coordinator session, sending prompt files to Codex-, Copilot-, or Grok-backed Workmux sessions, verifying status/capture, recovering from prompt delivery failures where text sits in the Codex input buffer or where Copilot/Grok must be launched and monitored manually, or setting up repo-local Workmux config with external Beads workspaces.","input":{"hint":"instructions for the skill"},"name":"workmux"},{"description":"Launch one or more tasks in new git worktrees using workmux.","input":{"hint":"instructions for the skill"},"name":"worktree"}],"sessionUpdate":"available_commands_update"}}

{"time":"00:05","event":"config_option_update","data":{"configOptions":[{"currentValue":"https://agentclientprotocol.com/protocol/session-modes#agent","options":[{"description":"Default agent mode for conversational interactions","name":"Agent","value":"https://agentclientprotocol.com/protocol/session-modes#agent"},{"description":"Plan mode for creating and executing multi-step plans","name":"Plan","value":"https://agentclientprotocol.com/protocol/session-modes#plan"},{"description":"Autonomous mode that enables allow-all and runs until task completion without user interaction (experimental)","name":"Autopilot","value":"https://agentclientprotocol.com/protocol/session-modes#autopilot"}],"type":"select","category":"mode","description":"Controls how Copilot responds: a conversational agent, planning multi-step work, or autonomous autopilot.","id":"mode","name":"Mode"},{"currentValue":"gpt-5.4-mini","options":[{"description":"Let Copilot pick the best model","name":"Auto","value":"auto"},{"_meta":{"copilotUsage":"1x","copilotPriceCategory":"medium","copilotEnablement":"enabled"},"description":"Claude Sonnet 5","name":"Claude Sonnet 5","value":"claude-sonnet-5"},{"_meta":{"copilotUsage":"1x","copilotPriceCategory":"medium","copilotEnablement":"enabled"},"description":"Claude Sonnet 4.6","name":"Claude Sonnet 4.6","value":"claude-sonnet-4.6"},{"_meta":{"copilotUsage":"1x","copilotPriceCategory":"medium","copilotEnablement":"enabled"},"description":"Claude Sonnet 4.5","name":"Claude Sonnet 4.5","value":"claude-sonnet-4.5"},{"_meta":{"copilotUsage":"0.33x","copilotPriceCategory":"low","copilotEnablement":"enabled"},"description":"Claude Haiku 4.5","name":"Claude Haiku 4.5","value":"claude-haiku-4.5"},{"_meta":{"copilotUsage":"15x","copilotPriceCategory":"high","copilotEnablement":"enabled"},"description":"Claude Opus 4.8","name":"Claude Opus 4.8","value":"claude-opus-4.8"},{"_meta":{"copilotUsage":"7.5x","copilotPriceCategory":"high","copilotEnablement":"enabled"},"description":"Claude Opus 4.7","name":"Claude Opus 4.7","value":"claude-opus-4.7"},{"_meta":{"copilotUsage":"3x","copilotPriceCategory":"high","copilotEnablement":"enabled"},"description":"Claude Opus 4.6","name":"Claude Opus 4.6","value":"claude-opus-4.6"},{"_meta":{"copilotUsage":"3x","copilotPriceCategory":"high","copilotEnablement":"enabled"},"description":"Claude Opus 4.5","name":"Claude Opus 4.5","value":"claude-opus-4.5"},{"_meta":{"copilotUsage":"7.5x","copilotPriceCategory":"high","copilotEnablement":"enabled"},"description":"GPT-5.5","name":"GPT-5.5","value":"gpt-5.5"},{"_meta":{"copilotUsage":"1x","copilotPriceCategory":"medium","copilotEnablement":"enabled"},"description":"GPT-5.4","name":"GPT-5.4","value":"gpt-5.4"},{"_meta":{"copilotUsage":"1x","copilotPriceCategory":"medium","copilotEnablement":"enabled"},"description":"GPT-5.3-Codex","name":"GPT-5.3-Codex","value":"gpt-5.3-codex"},{"_meta":{"copilotUsage":"0.33x","copilotPriceCategory":"low","copilotEnablement":"enabled"},"description":"GPT-5.4 mini","name":"GPT-5.4 mini","value":"gpt-5.4-mini"},{"_meta":{"copilotUsage":"0x","copilotPriceCategory":"low","copilotEnablement":"enabled"},"description":"GPT-5 mini","name":"GPT-5 mini","value":"gpt-5-mini"},{"_meta":{"copilotUsage":"1x","copilotPriceCategory":"medium","copilotEnablement":"enabled"},"description":"Gemini 3.1 Pro","name":"Gemini 3.1 Pro","value":"gemini-3.1-pro-preview"},{"_meta":{"copilotUsage":"14x","copilotPriceCategory":"medium","copilotEnablement":"enabled"},"description":"Gemini 3.5 Flash","name":"Gemini 3.5 Flash","value":"gemini-3.5-flash"},{"_meta":{"copilotUsage":"1x","copilotPriceCategory":"low","copilotEnablement":"enabled"},"description":"MAI-Code-1-Flash","name":"MAI-Code-1-Flash","value":"mai-code-1-flash-picker"}],"type":"select","category":"model","description":"The AI model Copilot uses to generate responses.","id":"model","name":"Model"},{"currentValue":"medium","options":[{"description":"No additional reasoning; fastest responses.","name":"none","value":"none"},{"description":"Minimal reasoning before responding.","name":"low","value":"low"},{"description":"Balanced reasoning and speed.","name":"medium","value":"medium"},{"description":"More thorough reasoning; slower responses.","name":"high","value":"high"},{"description":"Extensive reasoning for the hardest problems.","name":"xhigh","value":"xhigh"}],"type":"select","category":"thought_level","description":"How much reasoning the model performs before responding. Higher effort can improve quality at the cost of speed.","id":"reasoning_effort","name":"Reasoning Effort"},{"currentValue":"","options":[{"description":"Default Copilot agent","name":"Copilot","value":""},{"description":"Autonomous agent that finds and completes ready tasks","name":"task-agent","value":"beads:task-agent"},{"description":"Reviews the output of merge-batch-graphs.py for semantic issues the script
cannot catch. Recovers dropped nodes/edges and fills cross-batch gaps.","name":"assemble-reviewer","value":"understand-anything:assemble-reviewer"},{"description":"Validates knowledge graphs for correctness, completeness, and quality.
Runs systematic checks and renders approval or rejection decisions.","name":"graph-reviewer","value":"understand-anything:graph-reviewer"},{"description":"Use this agent when users need help understanding, querying, or working
with an Understand-Anything knowledge graph. Guides users through graph
structure, node/edge relationships, layer architecture, tours, and
dashboard usage.","name":"knowledge-graph-guide","value":"understand-anything:knowledge-graph-guide"},{"description":"Analyzes markdown files using pre-parsed structural data and LLM inference to extract knowledge graph nodes and edges (entities, claims, implicit relationships, topic clustering).","name":"article-analyzer","value":"understand-anything:article-analyzer"},{"description":"Analyzes batches of source files to produce knowledge graph nodes and edges.
Extracts file structure, functions, classes, and relationships using a two-phase
approach: structural extraction script followed by LLM semantic analysis.","name":"file-analyzer","value":"understand-anything:file-analyzer"},{"description":"Scans a codebase directory to produce a structured inventory of all project files,
detected languages, frameworks, import maps, and estimated complexity.","name":"project-scanner","value":"understand-anything:project-scanner"},{"description":"Analyzes codebases to extract business domain knowledge — domains, business flows, and process steps. Produces a domain-graph.json that maps how business logic flows through the code.","name":"domain-analyzer","value":"understand-anything:domain-analyzer"},{"description":"Analyzes a codebase's file structure, summaries, and import relationships to identify
logical architectural layers and assign every file to exactly one layer.","name":"architecture-analyzer","value":"understand-anything:architecture-analyzer"},{"description":"Designs guided learning tours through codebases, creating 5-15 pedagogical steps
that teach project architecture and key concepts in logical order.","name":"tour-builder","value":"understand-anything:tour-builder"}],"type":"select","category":"_agent","description":"Select a custom agent persona, or use the default Copilot agent.","id":"agent","name":"Agent"},{"currentValue":"on","options":[{"description":"Automatically approve all tool, path, and URL requests","name":"On","value":"on"},{"description":"Require approval for tool, path, and URL requests","name":"Off","value":"off"}],"type":"select","category":"permissions","description":"Controls whether Copilot prompts for approval before using tools, accessing paths, or fetching URLs.","id":"allow_all","name":"Allow All"}],"sessionUpdate":"config_option_update"}}
